title: 宝塚記念の後に・咲き誇る、青

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spurred on by the support of her fans, Rice
Shower wins the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made so many people smile, she finally
becomes the blue rose she always aspired to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen behind her, she
decides to run in the Arima Kinen against Mihono
Bourbon and Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the Takarazuka Kinen, only racers selected
by the fans can run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her state her intention to run in such a
prestigious race without a hint of apprehension, I
can sense how much Rice Shower has grown.
